info.name: Library Book Checkout API
info.description: Collection for testing the Library Book Checkout API. Run requests in order for a complete demonstration.

request.description: Returns all books with their current availability status. On a fresh start, books 1, 3, and 5 are available; books 2 and 4 are checked out.

Adds a new book. Restart the app and call GET /api/books — the book is still there, proving real persistence. Note: a production app would also include PUT and DELETE, but those were outside the original spec.
Checks out book 1 (The Pragmatic Programmer) to member 1 (Alice Johnson). Returns the new checkout with a due date 14 days from now.

item.name: 3. Try to check out the same book again (expect 409)

request.description: Attempts to check out book 1 again while it is already checked out. Should return 409 Conflict.

item.name: 4. Get all books (verify book 1 now unavailable)

request.description: Call this after request #2 to confirm book 1 now shows isAvailable: false.
Returns checkout #10 — the first checkout created during the session (IDs start at 10). After this, book 1 becomes available again.
Returns all unreturned checkouts past their due date. Checkout #1 (book 2, checked out 20 days ago) is seeded as overdue.
Returns summary statistics: total books, available, checked out, overdue, and total members.
